form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 22.06 when second at this track latest but the run prior she clocked a fast 21.75 over 390m finishing second at this track. Looks the one to beat on run two back.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after claiming her maiden success on December 21 at Capalaba over 366m. Last start was fourth over 366m in 20.80, behind Denim Beach. Should prove hard to beat.
